description: MCP Discovery — gateway exposes capabilities via GET /mcp/capabilities (STOA REST) or POST /mcp with initialize method (Streamable HTTP).

tasks.name: Basic capabilities request
tasks.notes: Baseline: gateway returns capabilities or tools object.

tasks.name: Discovery with auth header
tasks.notes: Authenticated discovery — JWT should be accepted, same result as unauthenticated.

tasks.name: Discovery with extra headers
tasks.notes: Proxy headers should be forwarded without breaking discovery.

tasks.name: Repeated rapid discovery
tasks.notes: 10 rapid discovery calls — tests caching and consistency under load.

tasks.name: Discovery with Accept header negotiation
tasks.notes: Content negotiation — gateway should respect Accept header.
